name: Kindergarten Mindful Movement — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space through a close look at noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space.

lessons.title: Try it together: noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space through a guided practice with noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space.

lessons.title: Make or show: noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space through a small creation or demonstration about noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space.

units.title: Wonder and notice: noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space through a close look at noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space.

activities.title: A close look at noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in noticing breath, posture, feelings, and personal space.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
